    S

    ScoreFour - Class in Unnamed Package
    This program simulates a Score Four game.
    ScoreFour() - Constructor for class ScoreFour
     
    scorefour.commands - package scorefour.commands
     
    scorefour.common - package scorefour.common
     
    scorefour.controller - package scorefour.controller
     
    scorefour.core - package scorefour.core
     
    scorefour.gamemodes - package scorefour.gamemodes
     
    scorefour.model - package scorefour.model
     
    scorefour.view - package scorefour.view
     
    setIndex(int) - Method in class scorefour.view.ButtonView
    ButtonView is made up of two images, hover and not hover, which can be switched between using the setIndex method.
    setMouseOver(boolean) - Method in class scorefour.controller.ButtonController
    Informs the ButtonController that the mouse is over its bounds.
    setMouseOver(boolean) - Method in class scorefour.controller.OverlayController
    Informs the OverlayController that the mouse is over its bounds.
    setMousePressed(boolean) - Method in class scorefour.controller.ButtonController
    Sets the buttons status as being pressed.
    setup(Game) - Method in interface scorefour.common.GameMode
    Initializes the GameMode setup and starts the game loop.
    setup(Game) - Method in class scorefour.gamemodes.NormalMode
    Initializes the game in NormalMode and starts the GUI and menu music.
    setup(Game) - Method in class scorefour.gamemodes.TestMode
    Initializes the game in TestMode and starts the command loop.
    setY(int) - Method in class scorefour.controller.ButtonController
    Sets the y-axis coordinate of the button
    setY(int) - Method in class scorefour.view.OverlayView
     
    ShowBoardCommand - Class in scorefour.commands
    The ShowBoardCommand shows a text representation of the board.
    ShowBoardCommand() - Constructor for class scorefour.commands.ShowBoardCommand
     
    startGUI() - Method in class scorefour.core.Game
    Starts the graphical user interface if a Panel object does not already exist.
    StartGUICommand - Class in scorefour.commands
    The StartGUICommand allows the user to start a GUI instance, if one doesn't already exist.
    StartGUICommand() - Constructor for class scorefour.commands.StartGUICommand
     
    state - Static variable in enum class scorefour.common.GameState
    A variable where the state of the game can be changed.
    stopEffect() - Method in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    Stops the currently active AudioController's effect
    stopGame() - Method in class scorefour.core.Game
    Stops the game loop from continuing and closes the graphical user interface.
    stopGUI() - Method in class scorefour.core.Game
    Stops the graphical user interface.
    StopGUICommand - Class in scorefour.commands
    The StopGUICommand allows the user to stop the current GUI instance, if one exists.
    StopGUICommand() - Constructor for class scorefour.commands.StopGUICommand
     
    stopSong() - Method in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    Stops the currently active AudioController's song
